title: Resume Engine
description: Built a scalable full-stack resume builder with JWT authentication, Spring Boot APIs, React UI, and MongoDB for persistent profile storage.

title: AI Chatbot
description: Developed a Gemini API-powered chatbot using Streamlit, Python, and prompt engineering to support multi-turn conversations and response optimization.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Created a responsive personal portfolio using React, JavaScript, and CSS with polished navigation, mobile layout, and project showcases.

title: Snake Game
description: Implemented a modular Python Snake game using OOP design, clean class separation, and interactive gameplay logic.

title: Splitwise Application
description: Built an expense-splitting CLI app with debt reconciliation logic, efficient data structures, and multi-user transaction support.

title: Money Manager
description: Designed a C++ transaction system with file persistence, categorized expense tracking, and modular OOP architecture.
